text.title: FinOps Framework — INFORM / OPTIMIZE / OPERATE Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Org claims OPERATE maturity but tag coverage is 40%; KPIs unverifiable.
antipattern.fix: Enforce phase exit gates as non-negotiable.

antipattern.symptom: FinOps lives in infra team; finance ignores; recommendations stall.
antipattern.fix: Stand up council with Finance + Business reps at biweekly cadence.

antipattern.symptom: No named FinOps lead; nobody drives decisions.
antipattern.fix: Name a practitioner with explicit RACI.
Define + publish KPIs per phase with baseline + delta.
